summary: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) was among Jim Cramer’s latest stock calls, as he suggested investors balance portfolios with hot and cold stocks. headline: Jim Cramer on CVS Health: “I Think It’s Only Going to Get Better as the Competition Disappears”
summary: CVS Health Corporation (NYSE:CVS) was among Jim Cramer’s latest stock calls, as he suggested investors balance portfolios with hot and cold stocks. Cramer said that he prefers CVS over NOW. Let’s start with a solid company with a stock that sells at 11 times earnings, CVS. I’m all for buying it for the Charitable Trust, […]

headline: UnitedHealth Prior Authorization Expansion Meets Mixed Returns And Valuation Upside
summary: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) is rolling out a major expansion of its medical prior authorization program, focusing on standardized, electronic workflows. The effort includes a broad shift to electronic prior authorization and a reduction in manual administrative steps for care providers. Rural providers are a specific focus, with changes aimed at making it easier and faster to secure approvals for patients. For investors watching UnitedHealth Group at a share price of $354.92, this move...
